backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, defining data types and state for entries, collections, pricing, navigation, and user profiles, with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key contents for build planning reference.
frontend/ic-assets.json: IC assets configuration that exposes the .well-known directory with CORS headers for domain verification.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with German locale, SEO and Open Graph meta tags for PaarWeg Basel, and Plausible Analytics integration.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: IC domain verification file listing paarweg.com and www.paarweg.com for Internet Computer domain binding.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all public pages of www.paarweg.com with priorities and monthly change frequency.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app using TanStack Router with routes for all core pages plus Basel and Zürich landing pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CalendlyInlineWi: React component that loads the Calendly script and renders an inline booking widget for roland-soder/kennenlernen.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App layout with sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation, scroll-to-top on route change, and a footer with Basel headquarters info.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendlyScript.ts: Hook that lazily loads the Calendly CSS and JS scripts once and returns a boolean indicating when they are ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a React Query hook `useGetAllPricingEntries` that fetches all pricing entries from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties using an oklch color palette.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page for coach Roland Soder, displaying his bio, qualifications, and core values with a CTA to book a free consultation.
frontend/src/pages/BaselCouplesLandingPa: SEO-targeted landing page for couples therapy in Basel, featuring a hero section, benefits grid, target audience list, and an embedded Calendly booking widget.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying contact cards, a step-by-step booking process, FAQs, and an embedded Calendly widget for scheduling a free introductory call.
frontend/src/pages/CouplesPage.tsx: Couples coaching service page describing benefits, target audience, and the coaching process, with a hero image and CTA linking to the contact page.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for the Paarweg coaching website featuring a hero section with CTA buttons, a services grid showcasing couples counseling, men's and women's coaching, and additional informational sections.
frontend/src/pages/LegalPage.tsx: Legal information page with tabbed navigation for Impressum, Datenschutz (privacy policy), and AGB (terms and conditions) sections, displaying static legal text for Roland Soder's coaching business.
frontend/src/pages/MenPage.tsx: Coaching page targeted at men, featuring a hero section, a grid of coaching topics (e.g., male identity, emotions, communication), and a working-style section with a CTA to book a free consultation.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Pricing page displaying two coaching options (free intro call and 190 CHF session), a four-step booking process, and an FAQ accordion covering session count, cancellations, and payment methods.
frontend/src/pages/WomenPage.tsx: Coaching page targeted at women, featuring a hero section, a grid of coaching topics (e.g., self-worth, boundary-setting, emotional intelligence), and a working-style section with a CTA to book a free consultation.
frontend/src/pages/ZurichCouplesLandingP: Landing page targeting couples in Zürich, featuring a hero section with a background video, a benefits grid, and an embedded Calendly booking widget.
frontend/src/types/calendly.d.ts: TypeScript declaration file that defines the CalendlyWidget interface and extends the global Window object to include an optional Calendly property.
frontend/src/utils/color.ts: Empty utility file, likely a placeholder for color-related helper functions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Empty utility file, likely a placeholder for URL parameter parsing or manipulation helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme with custom CSS-variable-based colors (oklch and hsl), border radii, the Inter font family, and enables the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, architectural notes, known issues, and two pending action requests to restore all frontend and backend files to their exact Version 145 live state.
